subject: Lead time request for burner spare parts
description: Hi team, we need Ignition Electrode with Cable (1.5 m) and Stainless Steel Burner Valve (Flanged) for a planned shutdown next week. Can you confirm current availability and expected delivery date to Berlin? If these variants are not available, please suggest compatible alternatives we can use without changes to the installation.

subject: Schedule request for annual boiler inspection
description: Hello, we would like to book Boiler Inspection Service Package (12 months) for our Berlin site during our shutdown window (Fri 18:00 to Sun 06:00). Please share your earliest available dates in the next 6 weeks and any prerequisites we need to prepare on site (isolation, access permits, documents).

subject: Quote request for planned maintenance bundle
description: Please provide a quote for the following items and related service time: Gasket Set for Heat Exchanger (30 pcs), Digital Pressure Sensor 16bar (0–16 bar), and Safety Temperature Limiter (130°C). This is for planned maintenance, and we would like delivery to Berlin. If you need any additional information to confirm compatibility, let us know.

subject: PT100 sensor length recommendation and pressure sensor substitution
description: We are standardizing our spare parts and need guidance on sensor selection. Which Temperature Sensor PT100 length (50 mm, 70 mm, 100 mm) do you recommend for typical boiler installations? Also, can Digital Pressure Sensor 16bar (0–20 bar) be used as a replacement for Digital Pressure Sensor 16bar (0–16 bar) in the same installation?

subject: Request for product documentation package
description: Could you share the latest installation guide, user manual, and 2D drawing for Stainless Steel Burner Valve (Flanged)? We need the documents for internal maintenance procedures and compliance documentation.

subject: Service package scope and warranty documentation
description: We are considering Boiler Inspection Service Package (12 months) and would like to understand the included scope and reporting. What documents should we upload or keep in the portal to maintain warranty coverage when we replace parts ourselves (for example PT100 sensors or pressure sensors)? Please confirm the minimum documentation required.
